name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Satellite startup Impulse Space will work with Anduril to develop space-based interceptor technology for Trump’s Golden Dome.

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Artemis II's Orion capsule is now exactly 100,000 miles from the Moon.

name: Polymarket
fullText:
JUST IN: The Artemis II toilet’s vent froze over, potentially causing the terrible smell astronauts reported. 

NASA is tilting the space ship toward the Sun to try & thaw it out.
